new_terms.context: Nvidia's next-generation Blackwell-based platform mentioned alongside GB200/NVL72.
The next generation of Nvidia's network interface cards (NICs).
Nvidia's current generation DPU used for frontend networking.
Custom DPUs developed by hyperscalers like Amazon or Google to replace standard vendor parts.
Physical dimensions and layout constraints for hardware modules in the chassis.
Amazon's specific hardware configuration for networking in the GB300/NVL72 racks.
Refers to the customizable section of the server chassis containing networking and power modules.
